DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John M. Anderson (559.647.4743) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days leave to answer. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
